text: The darkness around me deepens my sense of isolation and curiosity. The sterile corridors and dim glow evoke both unease and introspection. Here, the everyday trappings of the world—advertisements for beading, research slogans—appear strangely out of place, floating in the stillness. I feel awash in the quiet tension between progress and emptiness, compelled to question my presence and purpose amid these silent testaments to human endeavor.
